body.label: calc:extensionality_then_pointwise_calculation
body.name: calc_extensionality_then_pointwise_calculation
body.claim: Two functions are equal when their values agree pointwise.

proof.text: Apply function extensionality and calculate at an arbitrary point.

source.text:
Theorem. Two functions are equal when their values agree pointwise.

Proof. Apply function extensionality and calculate at an arbitrary point.
source.label: calc:extensionality_then_pointwise_calculation
